evals.prompt: Ho finito la feature sales YTD. Ho aggiunto la misura 'Sales YTD' che usa TOTALYTD e una nuova pagina report 'YTD Performance'. Documenta tutto: scrivi la descrizione per la PR, aggiorna il changelog e crea il design doc.
evals.expected_output: Three artifacts: a PR description with Summary/Changes/Business Impact/Testing sections, a CHANGELOG.md entry under [Unreleased] with Added items, and a docs/sales-ytd.md design note with What Was Built / Why / Key Decisions / Measures Added sections.

assertions.text: Output contains a PR description with a Summary section
Output contains a PR description with a Testing Done checklist
Output contains a CHANGELOG entry with '## [Unreleased]' or '### Added'
Output contains or references a feature design note (docs/ file or ## What Was Built section)
Output mentions the 'Sales YTD' measure specifically

evals.prompt: Aggiorna il changelog. Questa settimana ho: aggiunto la misura MTD Revenue, modificato la relazione tra FactSales e DimDate per usare cross-filter attivo, e fixato un bug sul conteggio clienti in scenari multi-regione.
evals.expected_output: A CHANGELOG.md update with Added, Changed, and Fixed sections under [Unreleased], plus a PowerShell script or command using Update-Changelog.ps1 to perform the actual update — not just a standalone markdown block.

assertions.text: Output contains '### Added' with the MTD Revenue measure
Output contains '### Changed' with the DimDate relationship change
Output contains '### Fixed' with the customer count bug
Output includes PowerShell code or instructions to append to CHANGELOG.md (not just a standalone markdown block)

evals.prompt: Scrivi la descrizione per la PR. Sono sul branch feature/customer-segmentation. Ho aggiunto: una tabella DimSegmento con 4 colonne, 3 nuove misure DAX (Revenue per Segment, Customer Count per Segment, Avg Order Value), e un visual a matrice nella pagina Segmentation Analysis.
evals.expected_output: A complete PR description following the template: Summary, Changes (Semantic Model + Reports sections), Business Impact, Testing Done checklist, Notes for Reviewers.

assertions.text: Output contains a '## Summary' or 'Summary' section with a plain-English description
Output contains a '### Semantic Model' section listing measures or tables
Output contains a '### Reports' section mentioning the matrix visual or Segmentation Analysis page
Output contains a Testing Done checklist with at least 3 items
Output mentions all 3 measures (Revenue per Segment, Customer Count per Segment, Avg Order Value)
